ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Level of the skill */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown period of the skill */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost of the skill */,
  "skill_type" TEXT /* Type of the skill (e.g., offensive, defensive, support) */,
  "skill_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the skill's image */,
  "is_learnable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the skill can be learned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., weapon, armor, accessory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the equipment (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "level_requirement" INTEGER /* Level required to use the equipment */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Durability of the equipment */,
  "equipment_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the equipment's image */,
  "is_equippable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the equipment can be equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., attack power, defense) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of the statistic (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_stats_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_equipment" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_equipment_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is banned */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Player's level */,
  "player_experience" INTEGER /* Player's experience points */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_skills" (
  "player_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player skill */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the player acquired the skill */,
  "skill_proficiency" INTEGER /* Player's proficiency with the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_equipment" (
  "player_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player equipment */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the player acquired the equipment */,
  "equipment_condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the equipment (e.g., 100% for full durability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_equipment_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "set_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the set was created */,
  "set_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the set's image */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the set is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sets_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_skills" (
  "set_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set skill */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_skills_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES player_sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_equipment" (
  "set_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set equipment */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_equipment_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES player_sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_stats_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES player_sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set being reviewed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player reviewing the set */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the set (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player recommends the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES player_sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
